title: Glasgow Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Glasgow with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event is rated CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Glasgow are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The city is experiencing a significant increase in heating degree days (HDD), with a value of 12.0 GG. 
 The humidity and wind levels are moderate, with an umidita of 60% and a vento of 8.3 km/h.
